response.justification: The role's core requirement is 8 years of C++ programming, but the candidate has only a brief stint writing C/C++ at National Instruments (~6 months in 2000-2001) and a bachelor thesis project. C++ is not even listed in their skills section. Their depth is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not C++ or large-scale cloud compute platforms. While they have seniority, mentoring exposure, and some distributed-systems work (Sociomantic), the central technical bar is not met.
strengths: Long tenure with senior/staff titles indicating leadership and mentoring capacity
Some distributed-systems exposure at Sociomantic handling high-throughput services
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science meets the education requirement
concerns: Effectively no professional C++ experience versus the required 8 years
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure ownership
Resume contains chronological inconsistencies (overlapping roles, implausible dates) that undermine credibility

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud platform / large-scale infra ownership
